summary_ja: Dreaming saturation日 — 2026-07-17。Dreaming-collect収集0件、filesystem scanで30件の生記事を確認。前日のtriageは消費済み。Dreaming-group (18:00 UTC) のtriage分析を出力ファイルからリカバリー。5件のreference enrichments（Fireworks Series D, Pinecone Sparse V3 + Text Match, ElevenLabs Interaction Models, Warp Self-Improving Code Review, Harvey Benchmark acquisition）を実行。14件スキップ（6件カバー済み、8件非AI）。

decisions.title: Fireworks Secures $1.5B in Series D Funding
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★★★ Fireworksが$1.505B Series Dを$17.5B評価額で調達、$1B ARR突破、40T tokens/day、95%が顧客特化モデル。既存entities/fireworks-ai.mdにSeries D情報なし。enrichment実行済み。
decisions.body_excerpt: Fireworks announced a $1.505 billion Series D at a $17.5 billion valuation... $1B ARR... 40T tokens/day... 95% from specialized models.

decisions.title: Sparse V3: how Pinecone's sparse index learned to skip
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★★☆ Pinecone Sparse V3がterm-major index layoutに再編。151× (SPLADE)/1,428× (BM25) I/O削減。既存entities/pinecone.mdにSparse V3言及なし。enrichment実行済み。
decisions.body_excerpt: V3 reorganizes the index around terms: each term owns its own posting blocks... 151× I/O reduction for SPLADE, 1,428× for BM25.

decisions.title: Pinecone Text Match Filters for Full Text Search
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★☆☆ Pinecone Text Match Filters — lexical queryがsemantic search前に候補プールを制限。unstated context問題解決。enrichment実行済み。
decisions.body_excerpt: Text match filters: a lexical query that restricts the candidate pool for semantic search... no pre-labeling required.

decisions.title: Interaction models: Natural human-AI communication
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★★☆ ElevenLabs Interaction Models — 人間-AI音声対話の3つの障害（割り込み、聞き返し不能、ターン間記憶喪失）とcascaded architecture。既存entities/elevenlabs.mdにinteraction models概念なし。enrichment実行済み。
decisions.body_excerpt: Interaction models are AI systems designed to communicate across audio and text in real time, perceiving not just what is said, but when.

decisions.title: How to build a cloud software factory - self-improving code review
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★☆☆ Warp factory第3弾 — outer-loop agentがcode reviewerを観察・改善。Skill=text+Python scripts、spec比較+build検証。enrichment実行済み。
decisions.body_excerpt: Outer-loop agent that observes the code reviewer and improves it over time... Skill = text instructions + deterministic Python scripts.

decisions.title: Y Combinator-Backed Benchmark Joins Harvey
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★☆☆ HarveyがBenchmark（YC出資の資産運用向け意思決定基盤）を買収。3回目の買収、$100M+ net-new ARR、$2T+ AUM。enrichment実行済み。
decisions.body_excerpt: Harvey today announced its acquisition of Benchmark, a decision infrastructure platform for asset management... $100M+ net-new ARR in Q2.

decisions.title: GPT-Red
decisions.reason_ja: ☆☆☆☆☆ GPT-Redは既存concepts/gpt-red.mdで包括的にカバー済み
